dataset_info.dataset_canonical_note: Dataset was generated with a different IQ-TREE version or seed than the canonical Gadi benchmark (xlarge_mf.fa). patterns=10000 vs canonical 98858. This run should be re-executed against the canonical file for cross-platform comparisons to be valid.
